assumptions.statement: Containment observes declared authority surfaces only and never reads secret values.
Root authority classification may invalidate legitimacy but never authorizes execution or merge.
Observability evidence does not make infrastructure authority sovereign.
Undeclared root mutation surface yields containment evidence and merge legitimacy NULL.
workflow_dispatch is observed as trigger-only and does not inspect secrets or authorize execution.
Deployment token authority is classified by surface metadata only; secret values are never inspected or persisted.
Federation and root runtime authority assumptions require containment and grant no inherited remote authority.
